title: PAM | Philipp´s Alarm Mod
description: A mod that adds new siren blocks with 3D Models that will play an Alarm if its powerd by redstone.
body:
![It shows a (self made) "Nuclear" Power Plant that uses the Federal Signal Modulator 6024 Sirens, to make Mass Notifications](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13dceec6646fa0d203b54f98f45cd540adcd74ce.gif)

This mod adds currently **16** new sirens to Minecraft, along with:
- New Recipies
- Siren Light
- New Advancements
- New Structures
- Siren Control Board
- New Blocks
- MCPs

The sirens must be powered by redstone in order to Activate.
---> There is a known issue that if you use the 3D model that it sometimes wont play the Alarm even if its powered. I do not know how to fix this, if you want to use them without this Bug you can use the SecurityCraft Alarm block with the Smart Module.

**Current Update Picture:**![This is a Picture of the ew Update Called German Engineering. It adds the Hörmann HLS F273, Hörmann HLS F71, Hörmann ECN 600D, E57, Control Box for the E57 and for the ECN 600D. It also adds the NEW Tutorial Book and the new Hörmann Key.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/669dd12c3a0d0080dc39bc0a3bacc4afb402b353.gif)

# Crafting Recipies:
**Its recommended to use JEI or REI**
### Basic Crafting Recipies:
   ****Speaker Recipie:****
-    Using 8x Iron Bars
-    Using 1x Noteblock
   ![Speaker Recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80f365ec0fbbb9bb8ca54bcd20c11f8e25bea46f_0.webp)
   ****Siren Light Recipie:****
-    Using 1x Red Stained Glass
-    Using 1x Redstone Lamp
-    Using 1x Red Terracotta
   ![Siren Light Recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c828ffdf4caff977715595f03db7c92c0b38ce0f_0.webp)
###   More complicated Recipies:
****Siren 1 (Block Version) Recipie:****
-    Using 1x Red Terracotta
-    Using 1x Speaker
![Siren 1 Recipie (Block Version)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caf1e4d2045dc2ade0301cf0f0ca583a10eaaaa9_0.webp)
****Siren 2 (Block Version) Recipie:****
-    Using 1x Siren 1 (Block Version)
  ![Siren 2 (Block Version) Crafting Recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3e7c833d751e084fe495adc22775022fcc2a773_0.webp)
****Siren 3 (Block Version) Recipie:****
-    Using 1x Siren 2 (Block Version)
  ![Siren 3 (Block Version) Recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/506cc718781ddabf0e1ede3eecca4cd61b7083eb_0.webp)
###   3D Siren Recipies
****Siren 1 (3D) Recipie****
-    Using 1x Siren 1 (Block Version)
-    Using 1x Siren Light
-    Using 1x Speaker
  ![Siren 1 (3D) Recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26435cb1f0fdb46549fbdab90ae008ba683b04a4_0.webp)
****Siren 2 (3D) Recipie****
-    Using 1x Siren 2 (Block Version)
-    Using 1x Siren Light
-    Using 1x Speaker
  ![Siren 2 (3D) Recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71158eb16976b7cb682e8267ef87f246032e5536_0.webp)
****Siren 3 (3D) Recipie****
-    Using 1x Siren 3 (Block Version)
-    Using 1x Siren Light
-    Using 1x Speaker
  ![Siren 3 (3D) Recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c10e694993b4f07ce055c9194e338d0bc80c3256_0.webp)

****If you encounter a Bug please report it in the Discord Server****
